<script>
// ── DATA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const profiles = [
  { id:1, name:'Gaming',     rules:['Steam', 'CS2'],              apps:2, buttons:8, macros:3 },
  { id:2, name:'Design',     rules:['Figma', 'Photoshop', 'Illustrator'], apps:3, buttons:6, macros:1 },
  { id:3, name:'Coding',     rules:['VS Code', 'Terminal'],       apps:2, buttons:7, macros:5 },
  { id:4, name:'Default',    rules:[],                            apps:0, buttons:4, macros:0 },
];
const runningApps = [
  { name:'Figma',       process:'figma.exe',       icon:'🎨' },
  { name:'VS Code',     process:'code.exe',         icon:'💻' },
  { name:'Photoshop',   process:'photoshop.exe',    icon:'🖼️' },
  { name:'Chrome',      process:'chrome.exe',       icon:'🌐' },
  { name:'Steam',       process:'steam.exe',        icon:'🎮' },
];
const profileAppMap = {
  'figma.exe': 2, 'photoshop.exe': 2, 'illustrator.exe': 2,
  'code.exe': 3, 'steam.exe': 1, 'cs2.exe': 1,
};

let state = {
  wf: 1,
  activeProfileId: 1,
  sidebarOpen: false,
  sidebarView: 'list',     // list | editor | appSearch | quickSwitch
  editingProfileId: null,
  navActive: 'home',
  logEntries: [],
  addedRules: [],
};

// ── SCALE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function scale() {
  const c = document.getElementById('canvas');
  const s = Math.min(window.innerWidth / 1612, (window.innerHeight - 80) / 906);
  c.style.transform = `scale(${Math.min(s, 1)})`;
}
window.addEventListener('resize', scale);
scale();

// ── NAV ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function navClick(nav, btn) {
  state.navActive = nav;
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  positionNavSlider();
  document.getElementById('screen-title').textContent = btn.textContent.trim();
}
function positionNavSlider() {
  const active = document.querySelector('.nav-item.active');
  const slider = document.getElementById('nav-slider');
  if (active) { slider.style.left = active.offsetLeft + 'px'; slider.style.width = active.offsetWidth + 'px'; }
}
window.addEventListener('load', () => setTimeout(positionNavSlider, 80));

// ── WORKFLOW SWITCHER ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function switchWorkflow(n, btn) {
  closeSidebar();
  state.wf = n;
  document.querySelectorAll('.wf-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  positionWfSlider();
  applyWorkflow(n);
}
function positionWfSlider() {
  const active = document.querySelector('.wf-btn.active');
  const slider = document.getElementById('wf-slider');
  if (active) { slider.style.left = active.offsetLeft + 'px'; slider.style.width = active.offsetWidth + 'px'; }
}
window.addEventListener('load', () => setTimeout(positionWfSlider, 100));

function applyWorkflow(n) {
  // Reset all workflow-specific UI
  document.getElementById('tb-badge').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('sim-panel').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('psp').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('switch-log').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('settings-cta').style.display = 'none';
  // Remove profile pill if any
  const existingPill = document.getElementById('nav-profile-pill');
  if (existingPill) existingPill.remove();

  if (n === 1) {
    // WF1: Profile pill in nav right
    const pill = document.createElement('div');
    pill.className = 'nav-profile-pill'; pill.id = 'nav-profile-pill';
    pill.innerHTML = `<div class="profile-dot"></div><span id="nav-pill-label">${profiles.find(p=>p.id===state.activeProfileId).name}</span>`;
    pill.onclick = () => openSidebar('quickSwitch');
    const navRight = document.getElementById('nav-right');
    navRight.insertBefore(pill, navRight.firstChild);
  } else if (n === 2) {
    // WF2: "Open Profile Manager" CTA on home screen
    document.getElementById('settings-cta').style.display = 'inline-flex';
  } else if (n === 3) {
    // WF3: Title bar badge + sim panels
    const badge = document.getElementById('tb-badge');
    badge.style.display = '';
    badge.textContent = profiles.find(p=>p.id===state.activeProfileId).name;
    buildSimApps();
    document.getElementById('sim-panel').style.display = '';
    document.getElementById('psp').style.display = '';
    document.getElementById('switch-log').style.display = '';
    updatePSP();
    renderLog();
  }
}

// ── SETTINGS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function openSettings() { openSidebar('list'); }

// ── SIDEBAR OPEN/CLOSE ────────────────────────────────────────────
function openSidebar(view) {
  state.sidebarOpen = true;
  state.sidebarView = view || 'list';
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('open');
  renderSidebarView();
}
function closeSidebar() {
  state.sidebarOpen = false;
  state.sidebarView = 'list';
  state.editingProfileId = null;
  state.addedRules = [];
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('editor-footer').style.display = 'none';
}
function sidebarBack() {
  if (state.sidebarView === 'editor') { state.sidebarView = 'list'; state.editingProfileId = null; state.addedRules = []; }
  else if (state.sidebarView === 'appSearch') { state.sidebarView = 'editor'; }
  renderSidebarView();
}
function setSidebarTitle(t) { document.getElementById('sb-title').textContent = t; }
function setBackBtn(show) {
  const b = document.getElementById('sb-back');
  b.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
}
function setEditorFooter(show) {
  document.getElementById('editor-footer').style.display = show ? 'flex' : 'none';
}

function renderSidebarView() {
  const v = state.sidebarView;
  setBackBtn(v !== 'list' && v !== 'quickSwitch');
  setEditorFooter(v === 'editor');

  if (v === 'list') { setSidebarTitle('Profile Manager'); renderProfileList(); }
  else if (v === 'quickSwitch') { setSidebarTitle('Switch Profile'); renderQuickSwitch(); }
  else if (v === 'editor') { setSidebarTitle(state.editingProfileId === -1 ? 'New Profile' : 'Edit Profile'); renderEditor(); }
  else if (v === 'appSearch') { setSidebarTitle('Add App Rule'); renderAppSearch(); }
}

// ── PROFILE LIST VIEW ─────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderProfileList() {
  const body = document.getElementById('sb-body');
  body.innerHTML = '';
  const wrap = document.createElement('div');
  wrap.className = 'sb-view';

  const secLabel = document.createElement('div');
  secLabel.className = 'sec-label'; secLabel.textContent = 'All Profiles';
  wrap.appendChild(secLabel);

  profiles.forEach((p, i) => {
    const isActive = p.id === state.activeProfileId;
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'profile-row stagger' + (isActive ? ' active-profile' : '');
    row.style.animationDelay = `${i * 80}ms`;
    row.innerHTML = `
      <div class="profile-dot-indicator"></div>
      <div class="profile-info">
        <div class="profile-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="profile-meta">${p.apps > 0 ? p.apps + ' app rule' + (p.apps>1?'s':'') : 'No rules set'}</div>
      </div>
      ${isActive ? '<div class="profile-badge">Active</div>' : ''}
      <div class="profile-actions">
        <button class="row-icon-btn" onclick="editProfile(${p.id},event)" title="Edit">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>
        </button>
        ${profiles.length > 1 ? `<button class="row-icon-btn danger" onclick="deleteProfile(${p.id},event)" title="Delete">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2"/></svg>
        </button>` : ''}
      </div>
    `;
    // Click row to switch profile (WF2 behaviour)
    row.addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.wf === 2) quickSwitchTo(p.id); });
    wrap.appendChild(row);
  });

  const newBtn = document.createElement('button');
  newBtn.className = 'new-profile-btn stagger';
  newBtn.style.animationDelay = `${profiles.length * 80}ms`;
  newBtn.innerHTML = `<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg> New Profile`;
  newBtn.onclick = () => { state.editingProfileId = -1; state.sidebarView = 'editor'; renderSidebarView(); };
  wrap.appendChild(newBtn);

  body.appendChild(wrap);
}

// ── QUICK SWITCH (WF1 sidebar) ─────────────────────────────────────
function renderQuickSwitch() {
  const body = document.getElementById('sb-body');

  const secLabel = document.createElement('div');

  wrap.appendChild(secLabel);

  profiles.forEach((p, i) => {
    const isActive = p.id === state.activeProfileId;
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'qs-profile-row stagger' + (isActive ? ' active-profile' : '');
    row.style.animationDelay = `${i * 80}ms`;
    row.innerHTML = `
      <div class="qs-check">
        ${isActive ? '<svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg>' : ''}
      </div>
      <div class="qs-name">${p.name}</div>
      <div class="qs-meta">${p.apps > 0 ? p.apps + ' rule' + (p.apps>1?'s':'') : 'No rules'}</div>

  wrap.appendChild(manage);
  body.appendChild(wrap);
}

function quickSwitchTo(id) {
  const prev = profiles.find(p=>p.id===state.activeProfileId).name;
  state.activeProfileId = id;
  const p = profiles.find(p=>p.id===id);
  // update pill
  const pillLabel = document.getElementById('nav-pill-label');
  if (pillLabel) { pillLabel.textContent = p.name; }
  const pill = document.getElementById('nav-profile-pill');
  if (pill) { pill.classList.add('pulse'); setTimeout(()=>pill.classList.remove('pulse'),700); }
  // update badge
  const badge = document.getElementById('tb-badge');
  if (badge && badge.style.display !== 'none') { badge.textContent = p.name; badge.classList.add('pulse'); setTimeout(()=>badge.classList.remove('pulse'),700); }
  // toast
  showToast(`Switched to ${p.name}`);
  // close
  closeSidebar();
  // re-render list if needed
  if (state.sidebarView === 'list') renderProfileList();
}

// ── PROFILE EDITOR ────────────────────────────────────────────────
function editProfile(id, e) {
  e && e.stopPropagation();
  state.editingProfileId = id;
  state.addedRules = [];
  state.sidebarView = 'editor';
  renderSidebarView();
}

  addBtn.onclick = () => { state.sidebarView = 'appSearch'; renderSidebarView(); };
  wrap.appendChild(addBtn);

}

}
